description_long: This is an open hardcover book with a blue cover and white pages, displayed so that both the left and right pages are visible. The left page features a sepia-toned illustration of a person standing, dressed in light-colored clothing, while the right page contains a block of printed text in a clear, readable font. The book's cover is solid blue, with no visible patterns or embellishments, and the pages appear to be made of standard paper. The book is moderately thick, suggesting a substantial number of pages. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on the central illustration and text.
description: An open blue hardcover book with white pages, featuring a sepia illustration of a person and printed text. The design is clean and modern, with a solid blue cover.
description_view_0: The book is open, showing both the illustration of a person on the left page and text on the right page, with the blue cover visible around the edges.
description_view_1: Viewed from the side, the illustration of the person is prominent, and the thickness of the book is evident, with the blue cover forming the base.
description_view_2: The book is open with the illustration now on the right page and the text on the left, providing a mirrored perspective of view 0.
description_view_3: From the opposite side, the text is more visible, and the illustration is partially obscured, with the blue cover again forming the base.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the cover is a sepia-toned image of a person standing, dressed in light-colored clothing. The style is realistic and photographic, focusing on the figure with no background or additional decorative elements.
